text: Hello. Hi. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Alyssa. I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through North Carolina state relief program. So have you been notified about these benefits yet? Melissa, I don't have part A of Part B. I haven't had any Medicaid and a lot of Medicaid money. Sorry, but you don't seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day.
